[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000111 3
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 10111100 5
5 10000010 2
6 11010010 4
7 00100100 2
